creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
Sorry, I forgot to add:

'zpool upgrade -a' and 'gpart bootcode -b /boot/pmbr -p /boot/gptzfsboot -i 1 vtbd0' would resolve the issue. But then of course the old 12.2-STABLE VM is no longer bootable:

Mounting from zfs:zroot/ROOT/default failed with error 45: retrying for 3 more seconds
